Stone, cut for
your home.

మా వద్ద అన్నిరకముల గ్రానైట్స్, మార్బుల్స్ లభించును

Granite and marble sold by the slab, then measured, cut, polished and fitted by our own team — flooring, door frames, kitchen platforms and pooja mandirs across Vizianagaram district.

Call for a rate See the stones

In the yard

What's in stock today

Slabs are kept full-size so you can see the grain before you buy. Come and pick the exact piece that goes into your house — nothing is sold from a photo.

Tan Brown

టాన్ బ్రౌన్

Warm brown with black grain. The safest choice for kitchen platforms — hides water marks and everyday use.

Ruby Red

రూబీ రెడ్

Deep red with a fine even grain. Used most for steps, skirting and temple platforms.

Black Galaxy

బ్లాక్ గెలాక్సీ

Mirror-polish black. Our first pick for door frames, window bands and lintel moulding.

Red Multi

రెడ్ మల్టీ

Black base with red flecks. A hard-wearing floor for verandas, pooja rooms and shop fronts.

Marbles

మార్బుల్స్

Italian and Indian marble in cream, beige and grey — for halls, staircases and wash counters.

Swipe to see more →

Finished jobs

Work we have fitted

Every one of these was cut and installed by our own masons. Photos are from houses in and around Vizianagaram.

From slab to fitted

How an order runs

Four steps, one team. You deal with the same people from the first measurement to the last polish.

01

Site measurement

కొలతలు

We come to your site, take the measurements ourselves and give the rate the same day.

02

Pick your slab

స్లాబ్ ఎంపిక

Choose the actual slab in the yard. We mark it in your name and keep it aside.

03

Cutting & edge polish

కటింగ్ & పాలిష్

Cut to size with mould, bullnose or plain edge, then polished before it leaves the yard.

04

Fitting at your house

ఫిట్టింగ్

Our masons fit and finish on site, and clear the waste when the job is done.

Why people come back

Straight rates, own team

Yard rate, no middleman

We buy direct from the quarries, so the price you get is the yard price.

Our own masons

Cutting, polishing and fitting are all done by our staff — not sub-contracted out.

Full-size slabs

See the whole slab and its grain before you pay for it.

Dates we keep

Delivery and fitting dates are given after checking the yard, so they hold.

Talk to us

Come to the yard

Call any of us for a rate, or just walk in and look at the stock. Telugu, English and Hindi are all fine.
